subgraphs.name: Video Timeline Edit (LTX-2.3)

nodes.title: Edit prompt
widgets_values: Replace the selected area naturally while preserving the surrounding scene, camera motion, lighting, and subject identity.
worst quality, blurry, jittery, distorted, duplicate objects, visible seams
nodes.title: Negative prompt

widgets_values:
## LTX-2.3 Timeline Edit

1. Choose a video and queue once.
2. Open **Video Timeline**.
3. Drag the blue selection, choose **Regenerate range** or **Inpaint mask**, and set context before/after.
4. For inpainting, paint the changed area frame by frame.
5. Click **Save & queue**.

The original audio is carried into the final video unchanged by the model.

subgraphs.description: Select a video range to regenerate or paint a frame-by-frame inpainting mask. Uses LTX-2.3 and the in/outpainting IC-LoRA with surrounding video context, then restores the original audio track.
